published_prior_art.cite: TramontanoDrtonEtesami2024 gives a necessary-and-sufficient generic direct-effect criterion and polynomial decision algorithm, but not an observable cumulant transfer formula; https://arxiv.org/abs/2405.20856

FoygelDraismaDrton2012 and BarberDrtonSturmaWeihs2022 give covariance-layer half-trek row systems, not higher-order cumulant systems for general non-linear latent confounding; https://arxiv.org/abs/1107.5552 and https://arxiv.org/abs/2201.04457

KivvaSalehkaleybarKiyavash2023 covers a single-proxy cross-moment setting, and TramontanoKivvaSalehkaleybarDrtonKiyavash2025 covers single-proxy or underspecified-IV lvLiNGAM formulas; https://arxiv.org/abs/2306.06263 and https://arxiv.org/abs/2506.05202
No verified paper gives cross-witness invariance for the proposed admissible cumulant families, but the proposition is largely a consequence of any valid common identifying formula.

MareisSturmaDrton2026 gives analogous asymptotic normality for covariance half-trek estimators; the cumulant-ratio delta method is standard once the formula and nonzero denominator are fixed; https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.26931
The covariance IV ratio is classical and is also used as the motivating special case in TramontanoDrtonEtesami2024; https://arxiv.org/abs/2405.20856

SchkodaRobevaDrton2024 uses graph-dependent higher-order cumulant rank machinery for discovery and finite compatible effect sets, not a sharp graph-level minimal cumulant order frontier for a TDE-certified edge; https://arxiv.org/abs/2408.04907

novelty_flags.label: comparator_promise_table / thm:closed-form-coefficient
novelty_flags.one_line: The table marks TramontanoDrtonEtesami2024, KivvaSalehkaleybarKiyavash2023, and TramontanoKivvaSalehkaleybarDrtonKiyavash2025 as strict tightenings, but no statement explicitly proves a strict class extension, reduction, or non-subsumption against those published comparators.

novelty_flags.label: def:cumulant-admissible-family / thm:finite-order-transfer
novelty_flags.one_line: The flagship focal object is the admissible family C and minimal order m_star, but the construction is currently a hidden-parameter equality rather than a graph-level construction, algorithm, or worked exhibit from observable primitives.

soundness_flags.label: ass:linear-mixed-representation / thm:cumulant-row-system
soundness_flags.one_line: The core states X = B_Lambda^T epsilon with B_Lambda = (I - Lambda)^(-T), while the cited TDE convention for Lambda_ab on a -> b uses the path-transfer matrix in the untransposed direction; as written, B_{p_s,i_r} is not coherently tied to the row system or IV reduction.

soundness_flags.label: def:cumulant-admissible-family / def:minimal-order
soundness_flags.one_line: Mcal_m is indexed only by G,u,v,I_v,Pi_v,m but membership is defined using Lambda and connected error cumulants, so the proposal must specify whether admissibility is graph-uniform, generic-over-parameters, or law-specific before m_star is a well-defined graph-level order.

accepted_scope_caveats.label: prop:plugin-delta-method / ass:denominator-margin
accepted_scope_caveats.caveat: Weak-denominator uniform coverage is not claimed; inference is conditional on a chosen admissible C with |det K_X(I_v,C)| >= c0.
accepted_scope_caveats.bound_claim: Delta-method consistency and asymptotic normality are pointwise claims under the denominator-margin condition, not weak-ID robust inference.

strengthening_paths.suggestion: Fix the transfer-matrix convention first: either change the representation to X = B_Lambda epsilon or transpose every B entry and re-check the row-system and IV-ratio algebra.

Redefine Mcal_m with explicit quantifiers: make it a graph-uniform admissibility condition, a generic parameter condition, or a law-specific object with P/Lambda/epsilon in its arguments; then bind m_star to the same choice.
Add a small worked TDE-certified bow graph exhibit computing an admissible C and the determinant ratio from cumulants, not from hidden B entries; this would clear the promissory-object floor.
Add comparator corollaries: one reduction to the 2023 single-proxy or 2025 lvLiNGAM formula, and one explicit TDE-certified graph outside those proxy/IV classes where the new formula applies.

recommended_next_step: Continue revise on this angle: repair the matrix orientation and Mcal quantification, then add explicit comparator and exhibit statements before Stage 0.
